---
title: "Formula grammar"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Formula grammar}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

This developer article will document the supported `bf()` grammar, including
response blocks, distributional-parameter formulae, and validation rules.

The current planning reference is `docs/design/01-formula-grammar.md`.

Current canonical bivariate form:

```r
bf(
  mu1 = y1 ~ x1 + x2 + (1 + x2 | p | ID),
  mu2 = y2 ~ x1      + (1 + x2 | p | ID),
  sigma1 = ~ x1 + x2,
  sigma2 = ~ x1,
  rho12 = ~ x1 + x2
)
```
